basic_details.job_title: IIT Indore Postdoctoral Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Indore (IIT Indore) Recruitment 2026: Indian Institute of Technology Indore has released the official notification for 1 Postdoctoral Research Associate posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking research jobs.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. in Mathematics with publications in reputed journals. Candidates who have submitted their Ph.D. thesis are also eligible to apply.
qualification.details: Postdoctoral Research Associate: Ph.D. in Mathematics with publications in reputed journals. Candidates who have submitted their Ph.D. thesis are also eligible to apply. Experience in research work in algebra or/and related fields is required.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 58,000/- + HRA (as applicable) if Ph.D. defense is done. Rs. 50,000/- + HRA (as applicable) if only Ph.D. thesis is submitted.
salary_details.details: Rs. 58,000/- + HRA (as applicable) if Ph.D. defense is done. Rs. 50,000/- + HRA (as applicable) if only Ph.D. thesis is submitted.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Indore Postdoctoral Research Associate Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 07-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Indore Postdoctoral Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Postdoctoral Research Associate position at IIT Indore is 07-06-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Ph.D. in Mathematics with publications in reputed journals. Those who have submitted their Ph.D. thesis are also encouraged to apply.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Postdoctoral Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The salary is Rs. 58,000/- + HRA if the Ph.D. defense is done, or Rs. 50,000/- + HRA if only the Ph.D. thesis has been submitted.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email with a detailed CV, publications list, research papers, research statement, and marksheets/degree certificates.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Postdoctoral Research Associate position at IIT Indore.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of candidates followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: This is a project-based recruitment for the Postdoctoral Research Associate position.

faq.question: Q9. What documents need to be submitted with the application?
faq.answer: A detailed CV, list of publications, three best research papers, research statement, and self-attested marksheets and Ph.D. degree certificates are required.

faq.question: Q10. Who should I contact for further information or to send my application?
faq.answer: Applications and recommendation letters should be sent to Dr. Sumit Chandra Mishra at [email protected].
